case_title: PEDRO MACHADO DE LIME VS. THE WESTERN UNION COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LIME, PEDRO MACHADO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THE WESTERN UNION COMPANY WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS T.W.U.C. $744.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $834.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE WESTERN UNION COMPANY WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS T.W.U.C.

RODRIGUEZ--ACCOUNT EXECUTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
